# Requirement Extraction Fixtures

This directory contains deterministic, redacted fixtures for PP&D requirement extraction tests.

The fixtures are curated from public PP&D and DevHub guidance facts already verified for the PP&D plan. They are not raw crawl output, browser traces, authenticated DevHub captures, private user files, or downloaded documents.

Coverage targets:

- obligations
- preconditions
- deadlines and temporal ordering
- exceptions
- action gates
- source evidence with stable fixture anchors

These fixtures are intended to be used before any live public crawl or authenticated browser automation is added.
